text:
I made a port for Norman Walsh's DSSSL stylesheets for DocBook
package.
  This package will be used by Handbook migration project.
  I put a tar'ed port in 
    ftp://ports.jp.freebsd.org/pub/incoming/ports-jp/textproc/\
        dbstylesheet-980317.tar.gz
